derivatives: emotional a. 令人动情的;感情的

senses.example: It takes a bit of nerve to cross these chain bridges.
senses.example_zh: 过这种铁索桥要有点胆量才行。

senses.example: The rope broke under the strain.
Many students are under severe strain during the college entrance exams.
senses.example_zh: 高考期间,许多学生都处于极度紧张之中。

senses.def_en: to injure by too much tension or use
senses.example: I strained my back when I lifted the box.
senses.example_zh: 我抬箱子的时候扭了背。

senses.def_en: to pull, draw, or stretch tight
senses.example: Too heavy a load will strain the rope to its breaking point.
senses.example_zh: 负载过重会把绳子拉紧到崩断的地步。

senses.def_en: an effort to do sth. using all your mental or physical strength
senses.example: I strained to remember where I had met him before. // Don't strain yourself! You need to rest more.
senses.example_zh: 我努力回想在哪儿见过他。// 别累坏自己!你需要更多的休息。

senses.def_en: a period of time following a disastrous event
senses.example: How does a country cope with the aftermath of war?
senses.example_zh: 一个国家如何妥善处理战后问题?

entries.mnemonic: 由词 come out(出来)颠倒顺序构成的名词

senses.def_en: the final result of a meeting, discussion, war etc. used esp. when no one knows what it will be until it actually happens
senses.example: Chance usually governs the outcome of the game.
senses.example_zh: 运气经常操纵比赛的结果。

entries.mnemonic: con(一起)+sequ(跟随)+ence→跟随其后→结果

senses.def_en: sth. that happens as a result of a particular action or set of conditions
senses.example: If you don't pay your bills you'll have to take the consequences.
senses.example_zh: 你如果不把账给付了,就得承担一切后果。

senses.example: Your opinion is of little consequence to me.
senses.example_zh: 你的意见对我而言不重要。

senses.example: There was no fighting and consequently no casualties.
senses.example_zh: 没有发生战斗,因此没有人员伤亡。

senses.example: The soldiers on guard of Tian'anmen Square stand without moving a muscle.
senses.example_zh: 天安门广场的战士站岗时纹丝不动。

senses.example: It took us a lot of muscle to get that piano up those stairs.
senses.example_zh: 把那架钢琴沿着那些楼梯搬上去费了我们很大的力气。

derivatives: muscular a. 肌肉的;肌肉发达的

senses.example: The pear had bruises of dark spots.
It is strange that girls are much easier to bruise their skin than boys. // Soft fruit bruises easily.
senses.example_zh: 很奇怪,女孩子的皮肤总是比男孩子更容易被碰青肿。// 细嫩的水果容易碰损。

extras.title: nerve
extras.content: get on sb.'s nerves 惹得某人心烦

extras.title: consequence
extras.content: in consequence 因此,结果 // in consequence of 因为…的缘故 In consequence of his bad work, I was forced to dismiss him. 由于他工作表现不好,我只好把他辞退。

extras.title: consequently
extras.content: 相当于 as a result,可放在句首或与 and 连接两个并列句。
Consequently, the age of 63 (the product of nine and seven) was thought to be a very perilous time for him. 译文:因此,63 岁(7 和 9 相乘的得数)被认为是他非常危险的一段时间。
